name_cn:
【Old Pink Tiger New Size】
Dior Mini Book Tote
A retro and stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery perfectly presents the look. It adds a highlight to your outfit just by carrying it. This mini size is adorable! It's also convenient for holding small items. Who wears it is stylish. A must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style No.: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11
